title: vangueria rubiginosa
intro: Vangueria rubiginosa, also known as the red milk tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antidiarrheal effects. The health benefits of Vangueria rubiginosa include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a remedy for wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are said to have a range of health benefits when used appropriately.
